---
title: Wi-Fi settings on Android 11+
---

Some Android versions require a bit of tweaking with the Wi-Fi settings when connecting to IIT Delhi network.

EAP: PEAP\
Phase 2 auth: MSCHAPV2\
CA certs: Use system certificates\
Online cert status: Do not verify\
Domain: iitd.ernet.in \
Identity: \<\ kerberos id \>\ \
Password: \<\ kerberos pass \>\
